title: High-Throughput RNA Extraction on Agilent Bravo
author: Miriam R Simon
materials: Plate and seal all reagents in the biosafety cabinet on the same day you plan to run the procedure with the following volumes: %s %s ReagentVolume per wellQuantityPlateLysis Buffer630 uL11 mL deep-wellMagbeads35 uL1Biorad 96-well PCREthanol900 uL11 mL deep-wellEthanol600 uL41 mL deep-wellRNA Wash 1530 uL11 mL deep-wellRNA Wash 2530 uL11 mL deep-wellPrep Buffer530 uL11 mL deep-wellNuclease-free Water50 uL1Biorad 96-well PCRDNase*60 uL1Biorad 96-well PCRInitial Sample**200 uL12 mL deep-wellElution Plate0 uL1Biorad 96-well PCRWaste0 uL32 mL deep-wellWaste0 uL11 mL deep-well

steps.title: To begin Bravo set up, switch...
steps.instruction: To begin Bravo set up, switch the instrument on BEFORE opening bravo software (wait about about a minute). NP Swab protocol in DeRisi Lab : GAR_magbead_v6.pro

steps.title: Retrieve 11 tip boxes, spray down...
steps.instruction: Retrieve 11 tip boxes, spray down Bravo decks and biosafety cabinet first with 70% ethanol, then with RNAse-zap/Windex, and again with ethanol.

steps.title: Place RNA Lysis Buffer on DECK...
steps.instruction: Place RNA Lysis Buffer on DECK 1, MagBinding beads on DECK 2, Sample plate on DECK 5, Waste (2 mL) on DECK 8, and Tip Boxes on DECKS 3 and 9.

steps.title: Transfer 600 μl RNA Lysis Buffer to Sample plate
steps.instruction: Transfer 600 μl RNA Lysis Buffer to Sample plate. a. This is done in 4 x 150 μl transfers b. Mix and shake Sample plate on DECK 5 for 5 minutes (1/min)

steps.title: Place RNA Lysis Buffer on DECK...
steps.instruction: Place RNA Lysis Buffer on DECK 1, MagBinding beads on DECK 2, Sample plate on DECK 5, Waste (2 mL) on DECK 8, and Tip Boxes on DECKS 3 and 9.

steps.title: Transfer 600 μl RNA Lysis Buffer to Sample plate
steps.instruction: Transfer 600 μl RNA Lysis Buffer to Sample plate. a. This is done in 4 x 150 μl transfers b. Mix and shake Sample plate on DECK 5 for 5 minutes

steps.title: Replace RNA Lysis Buffer on DECK...
steps.instruction: Replace RNA Lysis Buffer on DECK 1 with Ethanol (900 ul).

steps.title: Transfer 800 μl Ethanol to the sample and mix well
steps.instruction: Transfer 800 μl Ethanol to the sample and mix well. a. This is done in 6 x 133.4 μl transfers. b. Mix and shake Sample plate gently on DECK 5 for 5 minutes (half speed).

steps.title: Remove seal from MagBinding Beads plate
steps.instruction: Remove seal from MagBinding Beads plate. Replace tip boxes on DECK 3 and DECK 9 with new boxes.

steps.title: Transfer 30 μl MagBinding Beads to Sample plate
steps.instruction: Transfer 30 μl MagBinding Beads to Sample plate. a. Important: MagBinding Beads settle quickly, ensure that beads are kept in suspension while dispensing. This can be done by adding a mixing step to the MagBinding Beads plate before transferring to the Sample plate. b. Mix and shake Sample plate gently on DECK 5 for 20 minutes (half speed).

steps.title: Move the Sample plate/tube to the...
steps.instruction: Move the Sample plate/tube to the magnetic stand at DECK 7. Incubate for 4 minutes until beads have pelleted.

steps.title: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant
steps.instruction: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant. a. This is done in 11 x 145.5 μl transfers.

steps.title: Move Sample plate back to DECK 5
steps.instruction: Move Sample plate back to DECK 5. Replace MagBinding Beads with RNA Wash 1 on DECK 2. Replace Waste (2 ml) plate on DECK 8 with an empty Waste (2 ml) plate.

steps.title: Transfer 500 μl RNA Wash 1 to the Sample plate
steps.instruction: Transfer 500 μl RNA Wash 1 to the Sample plate. a. This is done in 4 x 125 μl transfers. b. Mix and shake Sample plate on DECK 5 for 5 minutes

steps.title: Move the Sample plate/tube to the...
steps.instruction: Move the Sample plate/tube to the magnetic stand at DECK 7. Incubate for 4 minutes until beads have pelleted.

steps.title: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant
steps.instruction: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant. a. This is done in 4 x 125 μl transfers.

steps.title: Move Sample plate back to DECK 5
steps.instruction: Move Sample plate back to DECK 5. Replace RNA Wash 1 with RNA Wash 2 on DECK 2. Replace tip boxes on DECK 3 and DECK 9 with new boxes.

steps.title: Transfer 500 μl RNA Wash 2 to the Sample plate
steps.instruction: Transfer 500 μl RNA Wash 2 to the Sample plate. a. This is done in 4 x 125 μl transfers. b. Mix and shake Sample plate on DECK 5 for 5 minutes

steps.title: Move the Sample plate/tube to the...
steps.instruction: Move the Sample plate/tube to the magnetic stand at DECK 7. Incubate for 4 minutes until beads have pelleted.

steps.title: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant
steps.instruction: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant. a. This is done in 4 x 125 μl transfers.

steps.title: Move Sample plate back to DECK 5
steps.instruction: Move Sample plate back to DECK 5. Replace Ethanol (900 ul) with Ethanol 1/4 on DECK 1.

steps.title: Transfer 500 μl Ethanol 1/4 to the Sample plate
steps.instruction: Transfer 500 μl Ethanol 1/4 to the Sample plate. a. This is done in 4 x 125 μl transfers. b. Mix and shake Sample plate on DECK 5 for 5 minutes

steps.title: Move the Sample plate/tube to the...
steps.instruction: Move the Sample plate/tube to the magnetic stand at DECK 7. Incubate for 4 minutes until beads have pelleted.

steps.title: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant
steps.instruction: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant. a. This is done in 4 x 125 μl transfers.

steps.title: Move Sample plate back to DECK 5
steps.instruction: Move Sample plate back to DECK 5. Replace Waste (2 ml) plate on DECK 8 with an empty Waste (2 ml) plate. Replace Ethanol 1/4 with Ethanol 2/4 on DECK 1. Replace tip boxes on DECK 3 and DECK 9 with new boxes.

steps.title: Transfer 500 μl Ethanol 2/4 to the Sample plate
steps.instruction: Transfer 500 μl Ethanol 2/4 to the Sample plate. a. This is done in 4 x 125 μl transfers. b. Mix and shake Sample plate on DECK 5 for 5 minutes

steps.title: Move the Sample plate/tube to the...
steps.instruction: Move the Sample plate/tube to the magnetic stand at DECK 7. Incubate for 4 minutes until beads have pelleted.

steps.title: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant
steps.instruction: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant. a. This is done in 4 x 125 μl transfers.

steps.title: Move Sample plate back to DECK 5
steps.instruction: Move Sample plate back to DECK 5. Replace RNA Wash 2 with DNase plate on DECK 2 and confirm it is unsealed. Replace tip boxes on DECK 3 and DECK 9 with new boxes.

steps.title: Transfer 50 μl DNase treatment to the Sample platea
steps.instruction: Transfer 50 μl DNase treatment to the Sample platea. Mix and shake Sample plate gently on DECK 5 for 10 minutes (half speed).

steps.title: Replace DNase plate on DECK 2 with Prep Buffer plate
steps.instruction: Replace DNase plate on DECK 2 with Prep Buffer plate.

steps.title: Move the Sample plate/tube to the...
steps.instruction: Move the Sample plate/tube to the magnetic stand at DECK 7. Incubate for 4 minutes until beads have pelleted.

steps.title: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant
steps.instruction: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant. a. This is done in 4 x 137.5 μl transfers.

steps.title: Move Sample plate back to DECK 5
steps.instruction: Move Sample plate back to DECK 5. Replace tip boxes on DECK 3 and DECK 9 with new boxes. Replace Ethanol 2/4 with Ethanol 3/4 on DECK 1

steps.title: Transfer 500 μl Ethanol 3/4 to the Sample plate
steps.instruction: Transfer 500 μl Ethanol 3/4 to the Sample plate. a. This is done in 4 x 125 μl transfers. b. Mix and shake Sample plate on DECK 5 for 5 minutes

steps.title: Move the Sample plate/tube to the...
steps.instruction: Move the Sample plate/tube to the magnetic stand at DECK 7. Incubate for 4 minutes until beads have pelleted.

steps.title: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant
steps.instruction: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant. a. This is done in 4 x 125 μl transfers.

steps.title: Move Sample plate back to DECK 5
steps.instruction: Move Sample plate back to DECK 5. Replace Ethanol 3/4 with Ethanol 4/4 on DECK 1. Replace Waste (2 ml) plate on DECK 8 with an empty Waste (2 ml) plate.

steps.title: Transfer 500 μl Ethanol 4/4 to the Sample plate
steps.instruction: Transfer 500 μl Ethanol 4/4 to the Sample plate. a. This is done in 4 x 125 μl transfers. b. Mix and shake Sample plate on DECK 5 for 5 minutes

steps.title: Move the Sample plate/tube to the...
steps.instruction: Move the Sample plate/tube to the magnetic stand at DECK 7. Incubate for 4 minutes until beads have pelleted.

steps.title: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant
steps.instruction: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant. a. This is done in 4 x 125 μl transfers.

steps.title: Replace Prep Buffer with Water plate on DECK 2
steps.instruction: Replace Prep Buffer with Water plate on DECK 2. Dry the beads for 30 minutes or until dry.

steps.title: Confirm Water plate is unsealed
steps.instruction: Confirm Water plate is unsealed. Place Elution PCR plate on DECK 4. Move Sample plate back to DECK 5. Replace tip boxes on DECK 3 and DECK 9 with new boxes.

steps.title: Transfer 45 μl of Water to...
steps.instruction: Transfer 45 μl of Water to the Sample plate on DECK 5. a. Mix and shake Sample plate on DECK 5 for 10 minutes

steps.title: Move sample plate to DECK 7
steps.instruction: Move sample plate to DECK 7. Incubate for 4 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer 40 μl from the Sample...
steps.instruction: Transfer 40 μl from the Sample plate to Elution plate on DECK 4. Freeze Elution plate and Sample plate in -80°C and discard all plates and tip boxes.
28. Transfer 500 μl Prep Buffer to Sample plate. a. This is done in 4 x 125 μl transfers. b. Mix and shake Sample plate on DECK 5 for 10 minutes.
